# airflow_pool (Data Source)

Fetches an existing Airflow pool.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "airflow_pool" "example" {
  name = "example"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The pool name.

### Read-Only

- `deferred_slots` (Number) The number of slots used by deferred tasks.
- `description` (String) The pool description.
- `id` (String) The pool name.
- `include_deferred` (Boolean) Whether deferred tasks are included when calculating open slots.
- `occupied_slots` (Number) The number of slots used.
- `open_slots` (Number) The number of free slots.
- `queued_slots` (Number) The number of slots used by queued tasks.
- `running_slots` (Number) The number of slots used by running tasks.
- `scheduled_slots` (Number) The number of slots used by scheduled tasks.
- `slots` (Number) The number of slots in the pool.
- `team_name` (String) Team name (Airflow 3 multi-team deployments).
